events.name: epidemic
events.description: Unknown pathogen spreads through the water system.

events.name: colonist_conflict
events.description: A bitter dispute over food rationing escalates to shouting.

events.name: solar_flare
events.description: Electronics damaged by electromagnetic pulse from solar event.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))

meta_awareness.insight: Rust Vega asks: 'If I am a LisPy data structure, can I rewrite myself?'

memories.event: Regolith dust causes chronic respiratory inflammation.
Lava tube entrance found — potential expansion space.
Electronics damaged by electromagnetic pulse from solar event.
Accusations of resource hoarding fracture the colony trust.
Fine Martian regolith clogs air filters and reduces solar output.
Earth sends updated colony charter with governance suggestions.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
A massive dust storm engulfs the colony for weeks.
